creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks for your patch, but unfortunately I cannot apply it: such a patch 
has already been submitted upstream by Thomas Adam, as you can see at 

http://www.mail-archive.com/rxvt-unicode@lists.schmorp.de/msg00610.html 

and it has been rejected by the author. See 

http://www.mail-archive.com/rxvt-unicode@lists.schmorp.de/msg00611.html 

and its follow-ups in the same thread. 

Let's wait for a fixed xorg!
